name: Pumpkin Custards
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy.
2. Stir in the canned pumpkin, evaporated skim milk, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, and allspice.
3. Place four 6-ounce custard cups in a shallow baking pan.
4. Pour the pumpkin mixture into each cup.
5. Place the baking pan containing the custard cups on the oven rack.
6. Pour boiling water around the custard cups in the baking pan to a depth of 1 inch.
7. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the centers comes out clean.
8. Remove the custard cups from the water and serve warm or chilled. If desired, garnish with fat-free whipped topping.
